commit_queue.commit_subject: refactor(vercel-ignore): lock down git capabilities; add boundary sha validation; scrub git env
commit_queue.notes: Phase 1 cluster commit for PR-87 (Cluster B runGitCommand lockdown). Concurrent agent active on agent-tools/ (see shared-comms-log 2026-04-28T15:25:00Z); explicit pathspec staging avoids cross-contamination. **BLOCKED 2026-04-28T15:32:00Z** by parallel session's lint error in agent-tools/src/claude/session-identity-hook.ts:104 (`@typescript-eslint/consistent-type-assertions` on a `parsed as { ... }` cast). Their file modified 42s before the pre-commit hook ran — actively in flight. Pre-commit hook runs lint repo-wide; my workspace-scoped gates were green. Awaiting owner direction (wait / per-commit --no-verify auth / surgical fix on their file / coordinate via comms-log). Files staged exactly as queued; commit message validated; only the gate is the blocker.

claims.intent: Phase 1 of PR-87 quality remediation: lock down runGitCommand chain. Replace generic executeGitCommand DI seam with two narrow capabilities (gitShowFileAtSha, gitFetchShallow); validate VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA at trust boundary against /^[0-9a-f]{40}$/; scrub git env to neutralise hostile global/system config. Closes MUST-FIX argv-injection class surfaced by adversarial security review and the last TO_REVIEW Sonar hotspot.
